name: Chicken Vegetable Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 1/2 cups Green Giant® frozen broccoli cuts, thawed
1 can Green Giant® sliced carrots (15 oz can), drained
1 jar Green Giant® mushrooms (4.5 oz can), drained and sliced
1 can condensed cream of chicken soup (10 3/4-oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguine to desired doneness as directed on the package. Drain.
2. Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add chicken; cook and stir 4 to 5 minutes or until no longer pink. Remove chicken from the skillet; cover to keep warm.
4. In the same skillet, melt margarine over medium heat. Add garlic, broccoli, carrots, and mushrooms; cook 4 to 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in milk, soup, cheese, and chicken; cook 1 to 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Stir in linguine; cook 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste; sprinkle with parsley.
Ready in 30 minutes
